## Summary

Describe the problem and the chosen solution.

## Security and compatibility

- [ ] No secret, recovery phrase, credential or signed artifact is included.
- [ ] Wallet/network compatibility is unchanged or covered by deterministic tests.
- [ ] Public strings are localized in every supported language.

## Validation

- [ ] ESLint and TypeScript pass.
- [ ] JavaScript/TypeScript tests pass.
- [ ] Rust formatting, Clippy and tests pass.
- [ ] Relevant physical-device behavior was tested.
- [ ] Public documentation was updated.
